heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Clyde Bruckman. Written by Al Boasberg.
clean: Directed by Clyde Bruckman. Written by Al Boasberg.

heading: Johnnie Gray
raw: [to the recruiter who rejects him] If you lose this war don't blame me.
clean: If you lose this war don't blame me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Annabelle's brother: Fort Sumter has been fired upon.
clean: Fort Sumter has been fired upon.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Mr. Lee: Then the war is here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Annabelle's brother: Yes, dad, and I'm going to be one of the first to enlist.
clean: Yes, dad, and I'm going to be one of the first to enlist.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Annabelle's brother: He didn't even get in line.
clean: He didn't even get in line.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Mr. Lee: He's a disgrace to the South.
clean: He's a disgrace to the South.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Annabelle Lee: Why didn't you enlist?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Johnnie Gray: They wouldn't take me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Annabelle Lee Please don't lie I don't want you to speak to me again until you are in uniform.
clean: Annabelle Lee Please don't lie I don't want you to speak to me again until you are in uniform.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Johnnie Gray: We had better stay here until daybreak to see where we are.
clean: We had better stay here until daybreak to see where we are.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Annabelle Lee: It was so brave of you to risk your life, coming into the enemy's country, just to save me.
clean: It was so brave of you to risk your life, coming into the enemy's country, just to save me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Recruiter: [after Johnnie has brought back The General] Occupation?
